channel.title: morningNewsSportsAndEntertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSportsAndEntertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Teddi Mellencamp Requested GLP-1s for Weight Loss Amid Cancer Battle
item.description: Teddi Mellencamp is getting real about her health. The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills alum shared that her doctor refused to prescribe her GLP-1s fo...

item.title: Taylor Sheridan's Western With Near-Perfect Rotten Tomatoes Score Leaves Netflix In 7 Days (Last Chance To Watch)
Gigi Hadid Reveals Bradley Cooper’s Massive Birthday Gift to Her
item.description: Gigi Hadid’s birthday is in full bloom—literally. As the model rang in her 31st birthday on April 23, she was showered with multiple bouquets of flowe...

item.title: How Hailey Bieber Got Billie Eilish to Join Justin Bieber at Coachella
item.description: There’s gonna be one less lonely girl—Hailey Bieber will make sure of it. A week after Billie Eilish joined Justin Bieber on stage for his “One Less L...

item.title: The Most Controversial Actor In Hollywood Keeps Proving Audiences Wrong
